mappings.snippet:
import { Button } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Button variant="contained" color="primary" size="medium">{label}</Button>

import { CloseIconButton } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<CloseIconButton size="medium" color="secondary" onClick={onClose} />

import { SegmentedButton } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<SegmentedButton aria-label="Options" options={[{ value: "a", label: "A" }, { value: "b", label: "B" }]} defaultValue="a" />

import { IconToggle } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<IconToggle iconName="heart" color="brand" aria-label="Favorite" />

import { FieldWrapper, TextInput } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<FieldWrapper label="{label}" helperText="{helperText}" sentiment="default"><TextInput /></FieldWrapper>

import { TextInput } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<TextInput label="{label}" size="medium" placeholder="Placeholder" />

import { Dropdown } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Dropdown role="input" label="{label}" options={[{ value: "a", label: "Option A" }, { value: "b", label: "Option B" }]} />

import { Checkbox } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Checkbox label="{label}" size="medium" labelStyle="thin" />

import { Radio } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Radio label="{label}" value="{value}" size="medium" labelStyle="thin" />

import { Toggle } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Toggle label="{label}" labelPlacement="left" size="medium" />

import { Slider } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Slider label="{label}" size="medium" defaultValue={50} showControls width={300} />

import { Chip } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Chip label="{label}" size="medium" color="primary" labelStyle="thick" />

import { ChipGroup } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<ChipGroup label="{label}" options={[{ value: "a", label: "A" }, { value: "b", label: "B" }]} defaultValue={["a"]} />

import { Link } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Link href="{href}" type="primary" size="medium" isExternal>{label}</Link>

import { Breadcrumbs } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Breadcrumbs size="medium" items={[{ label: "Home", href: "/", iconName: "home" }, { label: "{label}", current: true }]} />

import { Tabs } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Tabs type="primary" size="medium" defaultValue="a" items={[{ value: "a", label: "Tab Label" }, { value: "b", label: "Tab Label" }]} />

import { Alert } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Alert sentiment="brand" size="medium">{message}</Alert>

import { Toast } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Toast sentiment="primary">{message}</Toast>

import { NotificationBanner } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<NotificationBanner sentiment="brand" fillStyle="none" title="{title}" description="{description}" />

import { Tag } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Tag color="neutral" size="medium" label="{label}" />

import { Tooltip, Button } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Tooltip title="{title}" caretPlacement="top"><Button>{label}</Button></Tooltip>

import { Popover } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Popover content="textOnly" title="{title}" body="{body}" surfaceOnly />

import { Drawer } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Drawer type="textOnly" title="{title}" description="{description}" open />

import { Dialog } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Dialog type="default" title="{title}" description="{description}" open />

import { Modal } from "@codeai/cads-react";

<Modal type="default" title="{title}" open>{body}</Modal>
